payload.answer: No hard conflict. The existing fact says the overall Brain Slack agent project is planned/open, while the new fact says the MVP is implemented. Because MVP completion does not necessarily mean the full project is no longer open, add the MVP implementation as a milestone and do not overwrite the broader project status without explicit confirmation.
citations: Existing project state - The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New - The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement appears to refer to a narrower scope (the MVP) of the existing project, so it should be linked as a milestone rather than treated as a full replacement of the project's current status.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.

details: Detected a likely relationship between the existing project and the new MVP statement.
Preserved ambiguity by not treating MVP implementation as a definitive replacement for the full project status.
Prepared one durable memory card for the implemented MVP milestone.

repair_options: Add 'The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented' as a milestone under the existing project and keep the project status as open.
If the user intended the whole Brain Slack agent project to be implemented, explicitly update the project status from open/planned to implemented.
Ask for clarification on whether 'The Brain Slack agent MVP' is the same scope as 'The Brain Slack agent' or only a sub-phase.
